info.name: Dashboard Backend API (Nest) - Tests
info.description: Status/Invalid input/Response shape/Performance tests for all existing APIs. Auth uses JWT Bearer token (Authorization header). Run 'Auth (JWT)' folder first to populate tokens.

exec: pm.test('created has id/email/role', () => { pm.expect(j.id).to.be.a('string'); pm.expect(j.email).to.be.a('string'); pm.expect(j.role).to.eql('user'); });
pm.test('first has company_code', () => { const a = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(a.length).to.be.greaterThan(0); pm.expect(a[0]).to.have.property('company_code'); });
pm.test('first has company_name', () => { const a = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(a[0]).to.have.property('company_name'); });

pm.test('has dimension/data/filter/total', () => { pm.expect(j.dimension).to.eql('country'); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('data'); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('filter'); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('total'); });
pm.test('cumulative is non-decreasing', () => { const pts=j.points; for (let i=1;i<pts.length;i++){ pm.expect(pts[i].cumulative).to.be.at.least(pts[i-1].cumulative);} });
